items.briefing:
The US and allied governments, including Australia's partners, have issued a warning about Russian state-sponsored attacks targeting critical infrastructure. While the immediate focus is overseas, Australian organisations in energy, water, and transport sectors should remain alert, as these warnings often signal broader threat activity relevant to us. Separately, Australian executives are flagging concerns that AI tools are being adopted faster than proper oversight and return-on-investment checks are in place — a reminder to ensure any AI tools your organisation uses have been properly reviewed and approved.

**Practical tip:** Before using a new AI tool at work, check with your IT or management team that it has been approved — not all AI tools are safe for handling sensitive or student information.

featured.title: Microsoft backs Red Cross digital emblem initiative
featured.quote: Digital Emblem initiative could significantly improve cyber protection for Australian hospitals and aid organizations.
